name: Agent Commerce Content Series
description: We need a 3-part tutorial series: how to set up a principal-bound agent, send a delegated Lightning payment, and verify a trust credential in-browser. Target audience is developers entering agentic commerce. Written or video, your choice. 500,000 sats for the full series; 150,000 sats for standalone parts.
price_display: 500k sats full series / 150k sats per part
